summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 16/01/2025
Today, iron ore futures fluctuated upward. The most-traded I2505 contract finally closed at 797 yuan/mt,up 1.92% for the day. Traders showed an increased willingness to sell.
